{{Infobox technique
| name = Titan’s Blade
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]] activated the [[Titan]]'s Blade.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]]'s [[sword]] swells with the [[Titan]]'s Blade.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Titan]]'s Blade is a technique that can be infused into a [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Titan’s Blade]] is a technique that can be injected with [[soulfire]] to create a curved gray wall.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
